open_issues.description: AZ/FL DGI parquets are pre-bugfix (missing placeid column). Folds frozen with StratifiedKFold fallback — inconsistent with user-isolation protocol used by all HGI/fusion parquets. Regenerate AZ/FL DGI inputs via Phase-2 pipeline before any DGI × {AZ,FL} test in P3.

Florida/fusion category half-L2 ratio = 40.99× (expected 5–30×, Alabama is ~15×). Likely a scale imbalance between HGI and Sphere2Vec components in the Florida fusion. Confounds C02/C19 on FL. Investigate before P3 FL experiments.

leakage_AL_baseline.description: HGI leakage ablation: Alabama baseline arm (1 fold, seed 42, DSelectK+aligned_mtl)
leakage_AL_baseline.notes: Baseline for arm C comparison. cat_f1=0.786 is the pre-shuffle ceiling.

leakage_AL_arm_C.description: HGI leakage ablation: Alabama C_fclass_shuffle arm (1 fold, seed 42)
leakage_AL_arm_C.notes: cat_f1 collapses 64.19pp to 0.144 (≈ 1/7 random floor). next_f1 drops only 3.95pp. Confirms C29.

leakage_FL_baseline.description: HGI leakage ablation: Florida baseline arm (1 fold, seed 42, DSelectK+aligned_mtl)
leakage_FL_baseline.notes: Baseline for FL arm C comparison.

leakage_FL_arm_C.description: HGI leakage ablation: Florida C_fclass_shuffle arm (1 fold, seed 42)
leakage_FL_arm_C.notes: cat_f1 collapses 61.43pp to 0.151 (≈ 1/7 random floor). next_f1 drops only 6.46pp. Cross-state replication of C29.

expected.notes: CBIC 2025 baseline: Alabama/DGI, default MTLnet, 5-fold CV

cbic_AL_dgi.description: P0.4 CBIC sanity replication: Alabama/DGI, nash_mtl, 5f×50ep, seed 42
cbic_AL_dgi.verdict_rationale: next_F1 shortfall attributed to StratifiedGroupKFold vs CBIC's StratifiedKFold protocol (N04 provisional). To be verified by P5_protocol_delta. Within the 5pp stop-rule budget, so accepted as P0 exit.

leakage_AL_arm_A.description: HGI leakage ablation: Alabama A_no_hierarchy arm (le_lambda=0.0, 1 fold, seed 42)
leakage_AL_arm_A.notes: Arm A: removing explicit category-fclass L2 path (le_lambda=0→0.0) has negligible effect (Δcat=+1.36pp, Δnxt=+0.06pp). Confirms the hierarchy loss is cosmetic at le_lambda=1e-8. C30 supported.

leakage_AL_arm_B.description: HGI leakage ablation: Alabama B_uniform_negs arm (hard_neg_prob=0.0, 1 fold, seed 42)
leakage_AL_arm_B.notes: Arm B: uniform negatives → Δcat=−1.32pp, Δnxt=+2.40pp. Asymmetric per-task effect; not leakage signature. Hard-neg sampling is a design trade-off. C30 supported.

leakage_AL_arm_AB.description: HGI leakage ablation: Alabama AB_both arm (le_lambda=0 + hard_neg_prob=0, 1 fold, seed 42)
leakage_AL_arm_AB.notes: Arm AB: sub-additive interaction (Δcat=−1.66pp, Δnxt=+1.66pp). Most movement driven by hard-neg sampling (arm B), not hierarchy loss.
